name: Lord Baltimore Cake
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Jo Merrill
Cream the butter until smooth. Gradually add sugar and beat until fluffy.
Beat egg yolks until thick, then gradually add to the mixture.
Combine cake flour, salt, and baking powder with milk, alternating additions. Stir in extracts.
Pour batter into 3 greased and floured 9-inch layer pans.
Bake at 350°F for 25-30 minutes. Invert pans and cool completely.
Frost with Lord Baltimore Frosting.
